value.text:
Google Unified Security | Google Cloud
Page Contents
Google Unified Security
Google Unified Security is a context-aware security solution designed to deliver integrated, intelligence-driven, and AI-infused security workflows through Gemini. It empowers organizations to proactively defend against today's most sophisticated threats at Google speed and scale—across cloud, on-premises, and browser environments.
Make Google part of your security team to secure your organization like never before: at scale, in the cloud, and everywhere else.
Contact us
0:42
See Google Unified Security in action
Unlock preemptive security
With unified context across your organization, coupled with Google's unique understanding of the threat landscape, and AI-powered features through Gemini, Google Unified Security helps organizations evolve beyond reactive security to get ahead of the latest threats.
Powered by Google Gemini AI and market-leading threat intelligence
Google Unified Security is infused with Gemini and Google's threat intelligence from defending billions of users and responding to thousands of security incidents. With Gemini, security teams can detect more threats with ease, minimize toil, and take productivity to new levels. Google's threat intelligence helps organizations get ahead of the most novel threats, and expert help from Mandiant is there when you need it most.
Threat intelligence and exposure management
Multicloud and AI security
Secure enterprise browser
Threat detection and response
Incident response and expert assistance
Threat intelligence and exposure management
Know who is targeting you and where you are exposed
By defending billions of users, seeing millions of phishing attacks, and spending hundreds of thousands of hours investigating incidents, we have the visibility to see across the threat landscape to keep the most important organizations protected, yours.
With attack surface management and security validation, you can discover assets, understand exposure, and ensure the effectiveness of your security controls to thwart more attacks and take preemptive security to a new level.
Explore Google Unified Security
Google Threat Intelligence
Learn more
Mandiant SecOps Transformation services
Learn more
Multicloud and AI security
Reduce cloud risk and secure your cloud workloads, anywhere
Secure your multicloud environment with posture management, virtual built-in red teaming, and threat detection and response with Security Command Center (SCC).
With AI protection in SCC, you can discover your AI assets, implement security controls such as Model Armor to safeguard your AI systems and models, and detect and respond to threats targeting AI systems.
Explore Google Unified Security
Security Command Center
Learn more
AI Protection
Learn more
Secure enterprise browser
Protect your corporate data on any device
Built for the modern workforce, Chrome Enterprise Premium is an enterprise-ready browser that protects your corporate data as users work securely on the web from anywhere, on any device.
Prevent both accidental and intentional exfiltration of company-sensitive data and enforce data protection policies through data loss prevention controls and advanced malware and phishing protections.
Explore Google Unified Security
Chrome Enteprise Premium
Learn more
Google Security Operations
Learn more
Threat detection and response
Modern security operations starts here
Detect, investigate, and respond to threats at Google speed and scale with a modern security operations platform. Google Security Operations combines Google’s threat intelligence, Gemini in SecOps, curated detections by Google experts, and powerful response playbooks to make SOC teams more effective and efficient.
Explore Google Unified Security
Google Security Operations
Learn more
Google Threat Intelligence
Learn more
Incident response and expert assistance
World class experts by your side when you need it most
Define, optimize, and validate your Google Unified Security deployment to achieve a highly mature and proactive security posture and realize measurable security improvements. World-class Mandiant experts collaborate directly with your team, providing personalized strategic guidance, expert help before, during, and after an incident and proven best practices to accelerate your security transformation.
Explore Google Unified Security

Google Unified Security Recommended
Our recommended partner solutions represent a commitment to providing a best-in-class experience across our Google Unified Security portfolio, ensuring a unified defense for our shared customers.
Learn more
Market-leading security capabilities in one converged solution
A modern security operations leader
A leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for SIEM, Google Security Operations provides threat detection, investigation, and response with the speed, scale, and intelligence of Google.
Learn more
Unmatched threat intelligence
A leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Cyberthreat Intelligence Technologies, Google Threat Intelligence brings together the best of Mandiant, VirusTotal, and Google's internal threat research.
Learn more
World-class incident response
A leader in the Forrester Wave for Cybersecurity Incident Response Services, Google and Mandiant experts assist organizations and governments of all sizes in uncovering and eradicating sophisticated threat actors.
Learn more
View More
The easiest way to make Google part of your security team
Easy to buy
Advanced protection at a simple price. One simple per ingest price for all of Google Unified Security's rich functionality.
Cost effective
Capture savings when compared to individually purchasing security products. Google Cloud customers can also use existing commits to purchase Google Unified Security.
A rich ecosystem
With hundreds of third-party integrations, Google Unified Security gives you visibility, context, and control across your environment.
Freedom of choice
At Google, we don't play favorites. We treat and price all data equally, giving you the freedom to use the solutions you trust while enjoying the highest levels of support.
I see Google and its security suite as one of the top partnerships that I have within my organization. The value they bring, the expertise and the knowledge, the willingness to play with us to explore new opportunities and to look at new areas—it makes them a true partner and someone that we're very happy to be working together with.
Craig McEwen, Deputy CISO
Talk to a specialist today
Ready to start your Google Unified Security journey? We're here to help.
